call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about a car. 
Agent: Excellent! A car is a great use of funds. Now, the monthly payments would be approximately $198 for 60 months. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Hmm, yeah, that's… okay. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $200, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. We pride ourselves on transparency. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the interest rate is fixed at 8.99%? 
Agent: Absolutely. Fixed for the life of the loan. We can get the paperwork started right away if you'd like. 
Eleanor: Yeah, let's do it. 
Agent: Fantastic! I'm just going to need to verify a few details…

Agent: Hello Mr. Miller, this is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I've told you people before, I'm not interested. 
Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We believe this card could be beneficial with its rewards program. We are pre-approving you for a $2,500 Signature Credit Card at a rate of 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's highway robbery! I don't need another credit card, and frankly, I'm adding my number to the do-not-call list. 
Agent: Sir, please… 
Robert: (Hangs up)

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a referral from GreenTech Solutions. They mentioned you might be interested in a personal loan. 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, Mark mentioned something. I'm thinking about renovating my kitchen. 
Agent: That's fantastic! We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%. The terms are very flexible. 
Jessica: 7.49%? That sounds pretty good. What's the repayment schedule like? 
Agent: We offer terms from 36 to 72 months. A 60-month term would result in monthly payments of around $290. 
Jessica: Hmm, okay. Are there any hidden fees? 
Agent: Just a $150 appraisal fee, and that's it. No annual fees, no prepayment penalties. 
Jessica: Okay. I'm a freelancer, so my income fluctuates. Will that be a problem? 
Agent: We understand that self-employment can have variable income. We'll just need to see your tax returns to verify your income. 
Jessica: Alright. Sounds good. Let's move forward. I think I'm ready to apply. 
Agent: Wonderful! I'll just need a few more details…

Agent: Hello Mr. Brown, this is Lisa calling from Finance Solutions. We have a pre-approved offer for a $5,000 Personal Loan at 24.99%. 
Michael: (Scoffs) Seriously? I'm unemployed. Where did you even get my number? 
Agent: Sir, we understand your situation. This loan could help you get back on your feet. 
Michael: Get back on my feet? With a 25% interest rate? You're joking, right? 
Agent: We have options for… 
Michael: (Hangs up)

Agent: Good afternoon, Mrs. Davis. This is Kevin calling from Finance Solutions. I see you inquired about our Signature Credit Card online. 
Patricia: Oh, yes, dear. I was just looking at it. Could you repeat the interest rate, please? I didn't quite catch it. 
Agent: Certainly. We are pre-approving you for a $1,000 Signature Credit Card at an interest rate of 14.99%. 
Patricia: 14.99… that's a bit high, isn't it? 
Agent: It is slightly above our average, but given your credit history, it's the best rate we can offer at this time. It comes with a rewards program, offering cash back on purchases. 
Patricia: Cash back? Oh, that sounds nice. What kind of cash back? 
Agent: 1% on all purchases, and 2% on grocery and gas. 
Patricia: Hmm. I'm not very good with computers. I'd like to read more about this. 
Agent: Absolutely! I can email you a brochure with all the details, including the terms and conditions. Would that be helpful? 
Patricia: Oh, yes, dear, that would be wonderful. Thank you so much. 
Agent: You're very welcome. What's your email address? 
Patricia: It's patricia.davis@email.com. 
Agent: Perfect. I've sent the email. Please don't hesitate to call back if you have any questions.
